title: athyrium austro-orientale
intro: Athyrium austro-orientale, also known as the Southern Oriental Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Athyrium austro-orientale include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
